private static Entity CreateSenderParty(Guid senderQueueId)
{
    var senderParty = new Entity("activityparty");

    senderParty["participationtypemask"] = new OptionSetValue(1);
    senderParty["partyid"] = new EntityReference("queue", senderQueueId);

    return senderParty;
}

private static Entity CreateRecipientParty(string recipientEmail)
{
    var recipientParty = new Entity("activityparty");

    recipientParty["participationtypemask"] = new OptionSetValue(2);
    recipientParty["addressused"] = recipientEmail;

    return recipientParty;
}

var senderParty = CreateSenderParty(senderQueueId.Value);
var recipientParties = recipients
    .Select(CreateRecipientParty)
    .ToList();

Add activity party builders for DIA exception notification
